game.name: OmniSpeak - Keen 4
game.desc: Commander Keen 4 - Secret of the Oracle. OmniSpeak is an open-source re-implementation of "Commander Keen in Goodbye Galaxy".

game.name: OmniSpeak - Keen 5
game.desc: Commander Keen 5 - The Armageddon Machine. OmniSpeak is an open-source re-implementation of "Commander Keen in Goodbye Galaxy".

game.name: OmniSpeak - Keen 6
game.desc: Commander Keen 6 - Aliens Ate My Babysitter! OmniSpeak is an open-source re-implementation of "Commander Keen in Goodbye Galaxy".

game.name: OmniSpeak - Keen 7
game.desc: Commander Keen 7 - The Keys of Krodacia. OmniSpeak is an open-source re-implementation of "Commander Keen in Goodbye Galaxy".
